concerns.text: The plan cites 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/agentdog/taxonomy-v1.5' and 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/llmxive/agent-logs-benchmark-v1' as verified sources. These specific dataset IDs do not exist on the HuggingFace Hub (the 'agentdog' organization and 'agent-logs-benchmark-v1' dataset are not public or verified). The plan assumes the existence of a pre-packaged 'novel attack' benchmark dataset that likely does not exist. The methodology requires generating or sourcing a ground-truth set of 'novel' vs 'benign' logs, but the plan treats this as a pre-existing downloadable resource. This renders the validation strategy (US-02) infeasible as written because the required data for the 'Human Annotation Gold Standard' cannot be fetched from the cited URL.
